goal: Create hello.py with a greeting function and test_hello.py with pytest tests that validate the greeting functionality.
scope: Create hello.py file with a greeting function that prints a greeting message
Create test_hello.py file with pytest tests that import and test the hello module
Ensure both files are present and functional in the workdir
out_of_scope: Adding additional features beyond basic greeting functionality
Setting up continuous integration or deployment pipelines
Creating documentation files beyond the implementation
